definitions: v. 加剧 (在此语境下的释义)

examples.text: Even if the world were to cut emissions enough to keep global warming below 1.5°C, heat-waves would intensify in Africa and diseases would spread to areas not currently affected.
examples.explanation: 即使世界减少足够的排放量以保持全球变暖低于1.5°C，非洲的热浪仍会加剧，疾病也会传播到目前尚未受影响的地区。
